scripts.env:setup: npm run env:vapid && npm run env:token && npm run env:config && npm run env:admin
scripts.docker:dev: npm run env:setup && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dbs.yml -f docker-compose.services.yml -f docker-compose.simulators.yml -f docker-compose.client.yml -f docker-compose.interfaces.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml --profile dev up --watch --build
scripts.docker:start: npm run env:setup && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dbs.yml -f docker-compose.services.yml -f docker-compose.simulators.yml -f docker-compose.client.yml -f docker-compose.interfaces.yml up --build -d
scripts.docker:down: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dbs.yml -f docker-compose.services.yml -f docker-compose.simulators.yml -f docker-compose.client.yml -f docker-compose.interfaces.yml --profile dev down --remove-orphans
scripts.docker:logs: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dbs.yml -f docker-compose.services.yml -f docker-compose.simulators.yml -f docker-compose.client.yml -f docker-compose.interfaces.yml --profile dev logs -f
scripts.k8s:build: concurrently "npm run k8s:build:client" "npm run k8s:build:auth" "npm run k8s:build:agent" "npm run k8s:build:notification" "npm run k8s:build:sensor" "npm run k8s:build:simulator" "npm run k8s:build:socket" "npm run k8s:build:twin"
scripts.k8s:deploy: npm run k8s:deploy:namespace && npm run k8s:deploy:configmaps && npm run k8s:deploy:secrets && npm run k8s:deploy:states && npm run k8s:deploy:deployments && npm run k8s:deploy:ingress
scripts.k8s:update: npm run k8s:build && kubectl rollout restart deployment -n crowdvision
scripts.k8s:up:dev: npm run k8s:ingress:nginx && npm run k8s:wait:ingress && npm run k8s:build && npm run k8s:deploy
scripts.k8s:up:prod: npm run k8s:ingress:nginx && npm run k8s:wait:ingress && npm run k8s:deploy
scripts.db:clear:auth: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dbs.yml exec auth-db mongosh authdb --eval "db.dropDatabase()"
scripts.db:clear:twin: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dbs.yml exec twin-db mongosh twindb --eval "db.dropDatabase()"
scripts.db:clear:notification: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dbs.yml exec notification-db mongosh notificationdb --eval "db.dropDatabase()"
scripts.db:clear:agent: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dbs.yml exec agent-db psql -U agent -d agentdb -c "TRUNCATE chunks, documents RESTART IDENTITY CASCADE;"
scripts.db:clear: npm run db:clear:auth && npm run db:clear:twin && npm run db:clear:notification && npm run db:clear:agent
scripts.docs: npm run docs:build:user && npm run docs:build:dev && npm run docs:landing
scripts.test:agent: cd server/agent-service && uv run pytest tests/unit
scripts.test:agent:integration: cd server/agent-service && uv run pytest tests/integration
scripts.test: concurrently "npm run test:auth" "npm run test:twin" "npm run test:notification" "npm run test:sensor" "npm run test:client" "npm run test:socket" "npm run test:agent"
